intake.user_request: Re-run the CODEREF-CORE self-scan loop after today's 7 improvement fixes. Produce an updated self-scan-report.md showing the new baseline: capability/layer coverage, elementType population, stale count, test coverage, and RAG index health. Compare against the prior report from WO-CODEREF-CORE-SELF-SCAN-IDEATION-001.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Self-scan with multiple sequential pipeline stages (populate → rag-index → rag-search × 4 queries) then report authoring. Phased is correct: each stage gates the next, output report is the deliverable.

in_scope: Run populate.js to refresh index.json and graph.json
Run rag-index.js --provider ollama --reset to rebuild RAG vectors
Measure and compare: capability/layer coverage, elementType population, stale count, test coverage, header coverage, RAG index health
Write updated self-scan-report.md comparing against prior baseline
out_of_scope: Making any code fixes or improvements (read-only scan pass)
Filing new workorders or stubs based on findings

constraints: Read-only scan pass — no code modifications
Must compare against prior_baseline: total_elements=2431, capability_populated=0, layer_populated=0, element_type_undefined=2431, stale_count=1112, test_coverage_pct=35, header_coverage_pct=39
expected_improvements: header coverage > 39% (fix #7 added headers to 4 CLI files)
